'''Red 3''' was a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The fighter was flown by [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], and had previously been stationed near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] as part of the [[Ecliptic Evaders]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. The X-wing was eventually transferred to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="CCG-Red3" /> [[R2-F2/Legends|R2-F2]] served as the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] aboard Red 3.<ref name="XW-Core" />

During the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Red 3 was destroyed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] while protecting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during his attack run down the [[Meridian trench/Legends|meridian trench]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="ANH" />
